caption: The video features a man performing on stage, likely at a concert or event. He is wearing a white shirt with intricate blue embroidery and a black vest adorned with decorative patterns. The man has long hair tied back and is wearing glasses. He is singing into a microphone while playing an acoustic guitar, which is partially visible. The audience, seen from behind, appears engaged, with some members having their heads turned towards the performer. The background consists of wooden blinds, suggesting an indoor venue. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, possibly indicating the name of the event or organization. The atmosphere seems intimate and focused on the musical performance.
